title: Orange Sword
description: Change the diamond sword to make it look orange
body:
Change the diamond sword to make it look red, like the images
![orange sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f7a8a3e930d2aa84c37e17a77d0c09ff05e599e_0.webp)

this texture pack does not need optifine.

this texture pack is compatible with all versions from 1.21.6 to 1.15
